typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		project_number as string,
		function_code as string,
		source_name as string,
		sub_source_name as string,
		data_class_budget_name as string,
		data_class_Progress_name as string,
		data_class_percentage_code as string,
		data_class_quantity_name as string,
		data_class_time_name as string,
		sub_class_budget_hours_name as string,
		sub_class_budget_quantity_name as string,
		sub_class_progress_hours_name as string,
		sub_class_progress_quantity_name as string,
		sub_class_progress_installed_quantity_name as string,
		sub_class_percentage_code as string,
		unit_of_measure_Hours as string,
		unit_of_measure_Quantity as string,
		unit_of_measure_code_percentage as string,
		phase_code as string,
		schedule_resource_code as string,
		work_unit_code as string,
		work_area_code as string,
		activity_code as string,
		CWP_Code as string,
		IWP_Code as string,
		IWP_Status_Code as string,
		IWP_StatusDescription as string,
		PMID as string,
		PMID_Description as string,
		Contract as string,
		Cost_Code as string,
		Cost_Code_Description as string,
		Costing_COA as string,
		Drawing_No as string,
		Tag_No as string,
		spool as string,
		line as string,
		spec as string,
		system as string,
		Piece_Mark as string,
		Cost_Type as string,
		Number_Of_Pieces as string,
		Subsystem as string,
		text5 as string,
		Bom_Node_ID as string,
		Doc_ID as string,
		Staging_Reference as string,
		Level6 as string,
		planned_Status as string,
		progress_Status as string,
		workpack_status as string,
		IFC as string,
		ProgressHistoryID as string,
		ROCCode as string,
		Step as string,
		Is_Driving as string,
		Name as string,
		Capture_Origin as string,
		UserName as string,
		Progress_Entry_Date_Time as string,
		TimestampShift as string,
		ProgressDate as string,
		ProgressDelta as string,
		ProgressCumulative as string,
		Budget_Hrs as string,
		Progressed_Hrs as string,
		Budget_Qty as string,
		Progressed_Qty as string,
		Install_Qty as string,
		max_date as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	wildcardPaths:['Project_Data/NCSA/Sitepro/SiteproProgress/Sitepro_Progress.csv']) ~> sourceSiteproProgressStage
sourceSiteproProgressStage derive(FileName = concat( 'Project_Data/NCSA/SitePro/SiteproProgress/',        substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),        '/',        'Sitepro_Progress_',        replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),        '.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'FileName',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> snkProgressSiteproRaw
